name: cursor-mem
description: Cursorでclaude-memのMCPサーバーにアクセスし、過去のセッション記録を検索・新しい観測を記録。トリガー: 'メモリ検索', 'claude-mem', '過去の判断', '記録して', 'memory search', 'past decisions'. Do NOT load for: 通常のコーディング、一時的なメモ、実装作業。
capabilities: Search past decisions and observations using MCP tools
Record design decisions and patterns with custom tags
Access shared SQLite memory database between Cursor and Claude Code
View timeline of recorded memories and observations
Create entities and relations for knowledge graph storage
Enable seamless handoff between Cursor and Claude Code sessions
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill with no executable code. All 111 static findings are false positives triggered by documentation patterns. The skill only contains markdown files (SKILL.md, examples.md) that provide guidance for using external claude-mem MCP tools. JSON examples with backticks, database paths, and documentation URLs were incorrectly flagged as security issues.
valueStatement: Claude Code and Cursor cannot share session memory by default. This skill integrates claude-mem MCP server to search past decisions and record new observations across both development tools seamlessly.
userTitle: Share Memory Between Claude Code and Cursor
limitations: Requires separate claude-mem MCP server installation
Does not load for regular coding tasks
First search takes 2-3 seconds for worker startup
MCP configuration requires absolute paths in .cursor/mcp.json

useCases.title: Record Design Decisions
useCases.description: Document architecture choices and design rationale for implementation teams to reference later.

useCases.title: Search Past Solutions
useCases.description: Find previously solved problems and patterns before starting new implementations.

useCases.title: Handoff Between Tools
useCases.description: Record context in Cursor for Claude Code to continue work seamlessly across sessions.

promptTemplates.title: Check Past Decisions
promptTemplates.prompt: 検索: 過去の判断{mcp__claude-mem__query="[technology] decision rationale"}

promptTemplates.title: Record Pattern
promptTemplates.prompt: 記録: この実装パターンを記録{mcp__claude-mem__add_observations observations=[{type:"pattern",content:"[description]",tags:["source:cursor","pattern"]}]}

bestPractices: Record the why not just the what - focus on rationale behind decisions
Use consistent tags like source:cursor or source:claude-code for filtering
Link related files and observations for easier future discovery
antiPatterns: Recording temporary notes as permanent observations
Using inconsistent tags that make search difficult later
Forgetting to add context or rationale to recorded decisions

faq.question: Does this work with Claude Code app?
faq.answer: Yes. Both Cursor and Claude Code share the same SQLite database at ~/.claude-mem/claude-mem.db.

faq.question: How many memories can I store?
faq.answer: claude-mem uses SQLite with no hard limit. Storage depends on your available disk space.

faq.question: Can I use this without MCP server?
faq.answer: No. This skill requires claude-mem MCP server installed separately. See setup guide in SKILL.md.

faq.question: Is my data sent to external servers?
faq.answer: No. All data stays local in ~/.claude-mem/claude-mem.db. No network calls are made by this skill.

faq.question: Why are MCP tools not appearing?
faq.answer: Check .cursor/mcp.json path is absolute, script is executable, and Cursor has been restarted.

faq.question: How is this different from Claude Code memory?
faq.answer: claude-mem provides persistent cross-tool memory. Both tools access the same shared database simultaneously.
